subcodes.first_line: O servant of the one true God! The Morn of divine guidance hath shed its radiance upon the East and lit up the Orient
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق صبح هدایت پرتوی بر شرق زد خاور را روشن نمود و شعاای بر غرب زد
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @growth of the Cause
